vocab.meaning: một luồng gió mới (người/vật mang lại sự mới mẻ, hào hứng)
vocab.example: After hours of dry lectures, my art teacher was a breath of fresh air with her unconventional and creative approach.

vocab.meaning: truyền động lực mạnh mẽ, thúc đẩy ai đó nỗ lực
vocab.example: She really knew how to light a fire under her students, pushing us to achieve results we never thought possible.

vocab.meaning: người rất tốt bụng, lương thiện và chân thành
vocab.example: My high school geography teacher was the salt of the earth; he was always willing to help anyone in need.

vocab.meaning: am hiểu tường tận về lĩnh vực của mình
vocab.example: Mr. Harrison really knew his stuff when it came to ancient history, which made every lesson incredibly engaging.

vocab.meaning: che chở, nâng đỡ và hướng dẫn cho ai đó
vocab.example: My literature teacher took me under her wing and mentored me through my first creative writing competition.

vocab.meaning: người xuất chúng, lịch sự và rất đáng ngưỡng mộ
vocab.example: He was a class act—not only was he an expert in physics, but he also treated every student with immense dignity.

vocab.meaning: đặt ra tiêu chuẩn rất cao
vocab.example: She set the bar high for our class, but her constant encouragement ensured that we all reached our potential.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra một sự thay đổi cực lớn, có ích
vocab.example: Having a teacher who actually listened made a world of difference to my self-esteem during my teenage years.

vocab.meaning: sáng tạo, không đi theo lối mòn
vocab.example: He always encouraged us to think outside the box rather than just memorizing formulas from the textbook.

vocab.word: hit the nail on the head
vocab.meaning: nói đúng trọng tâm, giải thích chính xác vấn đề
vocab.example: Whenever I was confused, she could hit the nail on the head with a simple explanation that cleared up everything.
